title: Trump weighing options to strike Iran's critical oil hub, UN Ambassador Waltz says
summary_full: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.
summary_public: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.
